testsuite.name: me.owldev.adsignage.domain.playevent.AdPlayCountControllerTest

testcase.name: GET returns count, date, zoneId, and echoed adId()
GET returns 200 with count=0 for an unknown adId()
GET is per-ad — other ad's events do not leak in()
GET counts only FINISHED — STARTED rows are ignored()
